examples: The idea that TV shows like "Dallas" or "Dynasty" represent typical American life is laughable.
They both laughed but it was not because the idea was laughable but because they both so liked it.
The Athlete, the Lecturer, the Scientific Discoverer was a laughable, lovable, healthy young human thing.
Your projection of me, obvious by your reply, is so far off it is laughable.
When SD was introduced 10 years ago, it came with now-laughable 8 megabyte (MB) capacity.
